name: Bird Food Cups with Natural Wooden Perch, Bird Mirror Toys with Stainless Steel Food Bowls, Fun Stand Platform Toys for Birdcage, Bird Feeding & Watering Supplies for Parrot Cockatiels Parakeet Finch
description: About Lelepet bird feeding toy 🐦Made of pure natural solid wood, friendly to birds, safe, and secure, can resist wear and bite. 🐦A mirror on the wooden frame, the bird can see itself when it eats, enhancing its curiosity, exercising its enthusiasm, and increasing intellectual development. 🐦Provide 2 feeding cups with some of the bird's favorite food, which will further stimulate its enjoyment of playing with the toy. 🐦The cute rabbit shape will make your cage more interesting. 🐦Suitable for playing, climbing, and rest, reduce boredom and increase the activity of fun. Specification  Materi
